category.scope_note: Power tools exported from China to Peru under the INACAL NTP and technical-regulation framework, including cordless radio-equipped models and importer-driven market access.

title.en: China-to-Peru Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入秘鲁：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入秘魯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China-to-Peru power-tool compliance against INACAL NTP/IEC 62841, applicable technical regulations, MTC wireless homologation, importer-based customs workflow, and transport safety context.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具与秘鲁 INACAL NTP/IEC 62841、适用技术规章、MTC 无线核准、进口商主导清关流程和运输背景对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具與秘魯 INACAL NTP/IEC 62841、適用技術規章、MTC 無線核准、進口商主導清關流程與運輸背景對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is for informational comparison only and is not a certification decision, legal opinion, regulator assessment, customs ruling, market-access approval, or product design certification. Exporters and importers should confirm all Peru-bound obligations in force at shipment time with qualified legal and technical advisors.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照，不构成认证结论、法律意见、监管评估、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品设计认证。出口商与进口商应在出货前与合格法律及技术顾问核实当时生效的秘鲁要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照，不構成認證結論、法律意見、監管評估、海關裁定、 市場准入批准或產品設計認證。出口商與進口商應在出貨前與合格法律及技術顧問核實當時生效的祕魯要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made power tools entering Peru, the mandatory baseline is: INACAL-adopted NTP safety references where a PRODUCE/INDECOPI Reglamento Tecnico makes them mandatory, MTC equipment homologation for wireless cordless models, in-country importer-led customs and post-market accountability at Callao, and Spanish labeling/consumer information under INDECOPI. Peru does not apply an EU-style CE, no EU-style standalone EMC mark for non-radio tools, no EU-style outdoor-noise label, no EU-style RoHS regime, and no EU-style battery passport regime.
answer_first.zh: 对进入秘鲁的中国制造有线或无绳电动工具，强制基线为：若 PRODUCE/INDECOPI 对该类别发布技术规章则需依 INACAL 采纳的 NTP 进行符合性，含无线功能工具需MTC型式核准，清关及后续合规由当地进口商在卡亚俄港下的 SUNAT 体系负责，并执行 INDECOPI 的西班牙语标签和消费者信息要求。秘鲁不适用欧盟式 CE，不对非无线电工具要求欧盟式独立 EMC 标志，不设欧盟式户外噪声标识，不有欧盟式 RoHS 制度，也无欧盟式电池护照制度。
answer_first.zht: 對進入祕魯的中國製造有線或無繩電動工具，強制基線為：若 PRODUCE/INDECOPI 對該類別發布技術規章則需依 INACAL 採納的 NTP 進行符合性，含無線功能工具需 MTC 型式核准，清關及後續合規由當地進口商在卡亞俄港下的 SUNAT 體系負責，並執行 INDECOPI 的西班牙語標籤與消費者資訊要求。秘魯不適用歐盟式 CE，不對非無線電工具要求歐盟式獨立 EMC 標誌，不設歐盟式戶外噪聲標識，不有歐盟式 RoHS 制度，也無歐盟式電池護照制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
